claim: Core answerer-aware retrieval profiles landed: compact and broad.
evidence: RetrievalFlags gained context_budget; SEAM_RETRIEVAL_PROFILE=compact|broad reaches core surfaces and benchmark adapter; suite green.
next_step: Wire profile knobs into the self-improvement loop; run SEAM broad vs mem0 head-to-head.

claim: OpenAI judge path fixed for gpt-5.4+ reasoning_effort compatibility.
evidence: OpenAIJudge moved from hardcoded minimal to env-driven default low at both score and batch request sites; tests added.
next_step: Holdout-validate and productize capable-answerer retrieval profile.

claim: Repository now has one canonical running WebUI location.
evidence: seam_runtime/webui/dashboard.html is served by seam webui; stale Vite source archived; strays deleted; server health verified.
next_step: Continue dashboard hardening without reviving duplicate webui roots.

claim: Calibration scorer operationalized epistemic abstention policy and exposed dropped adversarial cases.
evidence: load_locomo_cases include_unanswerable=True recovers 444 cat5 adversarial cases; qwen trap-failure rate measured.
next_step: Capture adversarial_answer and run pooled multi-scope calibration.

claim: seam doctor now reports git stashes as a non-blocking advisory.
evidence: check_stashes parses stash list and CLI renders advisory without flipping overall doctor status.
next_step: Use seam doctor in hygiene sweeps; do not make stashes a blocking commit gate.

claim: Retrieval-time entity aggregation tested and kept default-off because answer-quality gains were marginal.
evidence: Free deterministic answerer A/B showed hardened lever about +0.0055 on cat1, within noise floor.
next_step: Move toward ingest/coreference or entity-aggregation dossier packing rather than string-match retrieval hacks.

claim: Tracked test docs and disposable generated test outputs now have fixed homes.
evidence: tests/docs/ added; 80 ignored test_pgvector_* sidecars moved under test_seam/pgvector/.
next_step: Keep test notes under tests/docs/ and generated artifacts under test_seam/<area>/.

claim: Answerer ladder showed cat1 is not solved by stronger answerers alone.
evidence: gpt-4o and o4-mini reached 0.595 overall but cat1 stayed roughly 0.44-0.48.
next_step: Build cross-turn entity coreference plus aggregation retrieval after cheap validation.

claim: LoCoMo retrieval budget knee established at top_k=100 and context budget=8000 for gpt-4o-mini baseline.
evidence: Four paid knee runs separated from baseline by about +0.14; 200/20000 flattened.
next_step: Treat search_top_k as config knob, not self-improvement candidate lever.
